cards.back: Generate descriptive statistics for a DataFrame, such as mean, std, min, 25%, 50%, 75%, and max values.
A way to split a DataFrame into groups based on one or more columns and perform operations on each group.
Unpivot a DataFrame from wide format to long format, where each column becomes a new row.
Create a spreadsheet-style pivot table as a DataFrame, with indexing on columns you want to be dimensions of the table.
Change the shape of a DataFrame from wide to long or long to wide format, often used when data is not in a suitable format for analysis.
